info.name: WealthPay API
info.description:
Complete test collection for WealthPay banking API.

Workflow:
1. Health Check
2. Open Account
3. Deposit / Withdraw
4. Reserve / Capture / Cancel
5. Close Account

Collection variables are automatically populated by test scripts so requests can be chained in order.

Note: This app is event-sourced with Kafka projections. The first GET after account creation includes automatic retry logic (up to 5 retries with 500ms delay) to wait for the read model to catch up.
